name: Disney MCP Server
what_it_does: Disney MCP server providing AI agents with access to Disney character and media data — querying Disney character information, movie details, franchise data, and entertainment metadata from the Disney API. Enables agents to answer Disney-related questions, build entertainment apps, and integrate Disney content data into conversational and creative workflows.
use_cases: Answering Disney trivia and character questions from entertainment chatbot agents
Building Disney character databases for fan apps from content agents
Generating Disney-themed content with accurate character details from creative agents
Querying Disney movie catalogs and franchise information from media agents
Building kids' educational apps with Disney character data from EdTech agents
Creating Disney-themed quizzes and interactive content from engagement agents
not_for: Commercial applications that would violate Disney's intellectual property rights
Streaming Disney+ content (this is for character/movie metadata, not streaming)
Official Disney business applications (use official Disney partnership APIs)
best_when: Building hobby projects, fan apps, or educational tools that need Disney character and movie data — for entertainment queries, trivia, and Disney franchise information.
avoid_when: Building commercial applications that use Disney IP — Disney's IP is heavily protected. Only for personal/educational projects.

auth.notes: No authentication — uses publicly accessible Disney API (disneyapi.dev). No API key required for basic usage.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Completely free — uses disneyapi.dev public API
pricing.notes: Free community MCP using the free Disney API. No commercial use implied — Disney IP restrictions apply.

performance.rate_limits: Community Disney API — unofficial, no SLA, rate limits unknown

known_agent_gotchas: Uses unofficial disneyapi.dev — not an official Disney API; availability not guaranteed
Disney IP is strictly protected — do not use for commercial applications
Data may be incomplete or outdated — community-maintained Disney character database
No SLA on underlying API — unsuitable for production applications requiring reliability
Character data may miss recent Disney releases — database updates are community-driven
Fun for hobbyist/personal projects only — treat as educational/demo tool
agent_readiness.security_notes: Uses public third-party Disney API (disneyapi.dev). No credentials. HTTPS. No data sent to Disney directly. Disney IP — personal/educational use only. Not for commercial applications.

security_score_components.security_notes: Public API. No credentials. HTTPS. No sensitive data. Hobbyist use only — commercial use would violate Disney IP.
